seoTitle: Send Text Messages in GoHighLevel: SMS Setup Guide
metaDescription: Set up SMS messaging in GoHighLevel to send texts, automate follow-ups, and manage customer conversations from a single dashboard.
intro: GoHighLevel's SMS tools make it possible to communicate with leads and customers affordably while automating much of your business messaging. This tutorial covers setting up your phone number, sending your first text, building automated SMS workflows, and managing conversations efficiently.

steps.heading: Set up SMS in GoHighLevel
steps.body: Configure your phone number and messaging settings so you're ready to send and receive text messages through the platform.

steps.heading: Send your first text message
steps.body: Try sending a one-on-one message to a contact to confirm your SMS setup is working correctly.

steps.heading: Create automated SMS workflows
steps.body: Build workflows that trigger follow-up texts automatically based on customer actions, saving time on manual outreach.

steps.heading: Manage customer conversations
steps.body: Use the dashboard to track and respond to ongoing SMS conversations with leads and customers in one place.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for message management
steps.body: Review tips for improving SMS marketing and customer engagement while staying organized as conversation volume grows.

faq.question: Is sending texts in GoHighLevel really free?
faq.answer: The tutorial focuses on an affordable way to communicate via SMS within GoHighLevel; exact pricing and messaging options are covered in the video.

faq.question: Can I automate follow-up texts?
faq.answer: Yes, creating automated SMS workflows that send follow-up texts based on customer actions is a core part of the tutorial.

faq.question: Can SMS be combined with other GoHighLevel tools?
faq.answer: Yes, the tutorial covers integrating SMS with workflows, pipelines, calendars, and AI-powered automations.

faq.question: Where do I manage all my SMS conversations?
faq.answer: GoHighLevel lets you manage conversations from a single dashboard, as shown in the tutorial.

faq.question: Who is this tutorial designed for?
faq.answer: Agencies, marketers, business owners, sales teams, customer support teams, and GoHighLevel beginners.
